utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: also I was the point person on my company transition from the KL ... 5 to GR ... 6 system .

utterances.speaker: The Interviewer
utterances.text: You must have had your hands full .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That I did . That I did .

utterances.speaker: The Interviewer
utterances.text: So let talk a little bit about your duties .

emotion_cause.span: 4_let talk a little bit about your duties .

utterances.speaker: The Interviewer
utterances.text: Now you will be heading a whole division , so you will have a lot of duties .

utterances.speaker: The Interviewer
utterances.text: But there will be perhaps 30 people under you so you can dump a certain amount on them .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No do not I beg of you !

utterances.speaker: The Interviewer
utterances.text: All right then , we will have a definite answer for you on Monday , but I think I can say with some confidence , you will fit in well here .
